subject: feat: overworld biome + village level + multi-level story flow + NPCs

overrides.reason: this commit is gameplay/flow wiring; the village composition is intentionally a first pass and is re-crafted (deliberate painterly layout) in the immediately following commit before the Pages playtest.

subject: feat: CRAFT the village — studied the palette, composed with real depth

subject: fix: stop the village death-loop — touch-pointer leak + i-frames + patrol-only intro (#13)

overrides.reason: the only render change is an alpha blink driven by the invuln timer; gameplay logic is covered by unit + browser tests and the fix was proven live this session by a Safari GPU screenshot read.

subject: chore: flip directive to RELEASED — Milestone 3 shipped + live-verified (#14)

subject: feat: device-profile landscape lock — phones lock, foldables/tablets stay free

overrides.reason: renderer reverted to its prior cover-by-height scaling; the new orientation overlay + lock are proven live this session (portrait prompt + landscape fill) at real phone viewports and unit-tested.

subject: feat: multi-aspect GenAI scenes — 16:9 / 9:16 / 1:1 picked per viewport

subject: fix: address PR #15 review — debounce orientation sync, drop stale comment, test readOrientationState

overrides.reason: a comment-only edit plus a debounce on the orientation state update; nothing rendered changes, and the orientation behaviour is covered by the expanded unit tests.

subject: feat: fully-layered NPCs — use the whole paper-doll part library

overrides.reason: NPC paper-doll spec data only; the composited sprites were verified via a rendered layer-stack contact sheet this session and the watchman's sword confirmed live in the village.

subject: fix: scale NPCs by content height — villagers were tiny next to Jim

overrides.reason: a scale-table entry + one renderer constant; the NPC peer-size ratio is unit-tested and the corrected village was screenshot-verified live this session.
